title: Document analysis finding
description: Domain-neutral finding contract. Domain evaluators may use specialized schemas for structured products and this schema for issue/risk/gap findings.

finding_id.description: Stable id: <evaluator-short>-<artefact-slug>-<3 digit seq>, e.g. lifecycle-methodology-v3-001

domain.description: Optional analysis domain, e.g. process, cv, contract, policy

evaluator.description: Evaluator/skill name. Kept open so new domains can add evaluators without editing the base schema.

engagement_type.description: Process-domain compatibility field, e.g. exercise, operation, threat-scenario, cross-cutting.

section_ref.description: Heading path, page, slide, shape id, or other locator where the finding was observed.

category.description: Domain-specific category, e.g. completeness-gap, privacy, job-match, internal-inconsistency.

expected.description: What good looks like, in one sentence

framework_refs.description: Anchors so a reviewer can defend the finding. Framework names are open for domain-specific references.

owner_hint.description: e.g. Red team lead, Recruiter, Hiring manager, Legal/Risk

confidence.description: Evaluator confidence in the finding given the evidence available
